# kIOHIDReportOptionNotInterrupt

**Enumeration Case**

An option that indicates the report isn’t interrupt driven.

## Declaration

```swift
kIOHIDReportOptionNotInterrupt
```

## Getting the Report Options

- **kIOHIDReportOptionVariableSize**: An option that indicates the report has a variable size.
